message:
feat: fix compile errors and add FAD/frankensqlite integration tests

- Add 10 integration tests for franken_agent_detection completeness (bead 3arih):
  connector factory instantiation, probe path coverage, slug mappings,
  source code audit for hardcoded paths, and auto-discovery verification
- Fix compile errors in search_frankensearch_integration.rs: update
  ScoredResult construction (add missing fields), fix ScoreSource::Semantic
  → SemanticFast, correct rrf_fuse signature to (lexical, semantic_hits,
  limit, offset, config), use FusedHit.rrf_score instead of .score
- Fix compile errors in frankensqlite_compat_gates.rs: use frankensqlite
  (Cargo.toml alias) instead of fsqlite, add fsqlite-types as dev-dep,
  remove unused FrankenError import
- Add FrankenStorage foundation and Gate 3 schema parity tests
- Fix collapsible_if clippy warning in indexer/mod.rs
- Auto-formatting cleanups across search and lib modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -33,6 +33,9 @@ shell-words = "*"
 dotenvy = "*"
 notify = "*"
 rusqlite = { version = "*", features = ["bundled", "modern_sqlite"] }
+# FrankenSQLite foundation for staged storage migration (bead 300hj).
+# Keep rusqlite side-by-side during transition; migration code opts in explicitly.
+frankensqlite = { version = "*", package = "fsqlite", path = "../frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite", features = ["fts5"] }
 rayon = "*"
 crossbeam-channel = "*"
 parking_lot = "*"
@@ -126,12 +129,9 @@ proptest = "*"
 serde_yaml = "*"
 rand = "0.10"
 rand_chacha = "0.10"
-# frankensqlite compat gate tests (bead 3vvqa) — COMMENTED OUT: fsqlite-mvcc requires
-# nightly features (peer_credentials_unix_socket, unix_socket_ancillary_data) which break
-# ALL test compilation on stable Rust. Re-enable when nightly toolchain is configured.
-# fsqlite = { version = "0.1.1", path = "../frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite", features = ["fts5"] }
-# fsqlite-types = { version = "0.1.1", path = "../frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite-types" }
-# fsqlite-error = { version = "0.1.1", path = "../frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite-error" }
+# frankensqlite compat gate tests (bead 3vvqa) — fsqlite-types needed for SqliteValue
+# enum variants in test assertions. The main fsqlite dep is available as `frankensqlite`.
+fsqlite-types = { version = "0.1.1", path = "../frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite-types" }
 
 [[bin]]
 name = "cass"
